meaning: n.食肉动物n.(动物或植物)食肉类,食肉动物,食虫植物
examples: It's a gharial, perhaps the largest terrestrial carnivore ever to walk the earth, larger than T-Rex.
The polar bear is the largest terrestrial carnivore, being more than twice as big as the Siberian Tiger!
With our present data, we don't know what precisely the interactions were between a primate and a big carnivore.
"We are at a crucial time in history, " said William Pratesi, coordinator for the Large Carnivore Initiative for Europe.
Carnivore works as a "black box" attached to the core of ISP networks.
